title: YieldMax launches a new SpaceX options ETF: What investors should know
summary: SpaceX (SPCX) dropped below its IPO price on Wednesday, sinking below $140 per share. YieldMax ETFs chief strategist Mike Khouw comes on Market Domination to discuss his firm's new ETF product with options-based strategies on SpaceX: the YieldMax SPCX Option Income Strategy ETF (YSPC).

title: Tesla, Paper Transport partner on electric semi evaluation in Chicago
